title: Consistent Colouring Across Widgets in Dashboard

posts.author: daisybiodiversify (Daisy)
posts.cookedHtml:
Description

Hey,
the work that has already happened on allowing editing to recolour widget has really helped, but it would be much better if we could have an option to apply the colour / order of x-axis on graphs etc. to entire dashboards.

At the moment, if you want items with ‘X’ to be green on all widgets you have to go and manually change the settings on each widget type. This is also the same for the X-axis order, if you want to change the order of things in the X-axis categories, you have to change them in each individual widget this is quite draining on people’s time.

What are you trying to achieve

Save time / improve efficiency when using dashboards and improve visual depicting on information in dashboard view.
